arts.ttl: Ally McCoist floats Elon Musk Rangers takeover amid Liverpool talk as Ibrox hero quips 'I'd take him'
arts.sum: The Ibrox hero offered a quick-witted response when discussing the wealthiest man in the world on talkSPORT

arts.ttl: Why Rangers fans will go 'f****** mental' at Patrick Stewart as Ibrox favourite names 2 players he'd sign right now

arts.ttl: Alfredo Morelos arrived at Rangers overweight but he made history and now I'm weighing up a reunion
arts.sum: The Colombian forward is set to return to Santos - who are now managed by Pedro Caixinha - after his loan with Atletico Nacional expired
